description: In a flashback, the young Malick brothers investigate their father’s copy of 'Paradise Lost' and discover the notched white stone used to rig the sacrificial ceremony. Their perception of their father is shattered, but they resolve to honor the Hydra faith honestly and stick together.

transcript.line: I can't sleep, either. I'm trying not to be nervous about the ceremony tomorrow, but...
Whitehall's a blowhard. He was trying to mess with us.
Dad, he would swap in this stone during the ceremonies and feel for the notch to make sure he never drew it from the bag.
But he did! It's all right here, Gideon. Dad was afraid to be the Traveler. He was a coward and a cheater. Everything he said to us was a lie.
Maybe Dad wasn't who we thought he was, but our family has upheld this faith for centuries. And that is not gonna end with us. We'll be better men.
We do the ceremony the right way and let fate decide.
